ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer's location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., sales, marketing) */,
  "account_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user managing the account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_account_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account associated with the sales record */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date of the sales transaction */,
  "sales_amount" REAL /* Amount of the sales transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_regions" (
  "account_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account-region assignment */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account assigned to the region */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region assigned to the account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account-region assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account-region assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_regions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales, marketing) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
